code:
import io
import string

let raw = io.read_to_end()
let input = "#{raw} "
let n = string.len(input)

mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut evens_count = 0
mut odds_count = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if string.len(token) > 0
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(num)
        if num % 2 == 0
          if evens_count == 0
            evens = "#{num}"
          else
            evens = "#{evens} #{num}"
          end
          evens_count = evens_count + 1
        else
          if odds_count == 0
            odds = "#{num}"
          else
            odds = "#{odds} #{num}"
          end
          odds_count = odds_count + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
